text: Top 5 countries by session count in Sep 2025.

text: What is the average load time per owner?

query.explanation: Calculates average load time in seconds per owner, sorted by slowest first.

text: Show sessions with average round trip time over 200ms

query.explanation: Finds sessions with high round-trip time (>200ms), converting the string RTT field to a number first.

text: What is the average session duration per city?

query.explanation: Calculates average session duration in seconds per city, filtering out zero-duration sessions.

text: Which browsers are most commonly used by viewers?

query.explanation: Groups sessions by browser name and counts each, sorted by most popular.

text: Which servers (computers) are handling the most sessions?

query.explanation: Groups sessions by server hostname and counts them, showing most-used servers.

text: Show me the subscription status for owner eduardo

text: Which sessions had packet loss above 500?

query.explanation: Finds sessions with high packet loss (>500 packets), sorted worst-first.

text: Which apps had the most sessions last month?

query.explanation: Groups sessions by app owner and name, counts them, and shows the top 20 apps.
